title: VeloraOS 1.10.18 - Persistent TLS Hotfix
releaseNotes: Stops normal VeloraOS updates from regenerating a valid HTTPS device certificate and private key.
Keeps the VeloraOS Local CA stable across software updates and adds an updater safety check that rejects accidental CA rotation.
Fixes 403 Forbidden when downloading the Local CA certificate by serving a safe public copy outside the protected private-key directory.
Makes /veloraos-local-ca.crt available without account authentication so a new device can establish trust before signing in.
Preserves Chat stability, model intelligence, background jobs, PWA support and secure rollback updates.
